notes: Each issue is a teachable unit for PulseWorld spawns; map to PulseU courses or PIPs as needed.

issues.title: No power, no LEDs, no fan spin

Storage: smartctl -a/-x, vendor SSD tools, NVMe self-tests
Network: netsh wlan show interfaces, netsh trace start capture=yes, Wireshark
pmset -g batt, System Information → Power
system_profiler, Wireless Diagnostics, sysdiagnose
Logs: log show --predicate
Storage: smartctl, nvme smart-log
Thermals/Power: sensors, powertop, tlp-stat
Network: iw dev wlan0 link, iwconfig, ethtool/ethtool -k
Logs: dmesg, journalctl -k, journalctl --boot=-1
MemTest86 (UEFI) preferred over OS-only tests
Reallocated/pending sectors, CRC errors, media/data errors
Percentage Used, Available Spare, Data Units Written/Read
Controller Busy Time, Unsafe Shutdowns, Media/Integrity Errors
Temperature sensors, firmware version, link speed/lanes
Design vs full-charge capacity, cycle count, wear %, voltage, current, temperature
Charge/discharge rate, charging thresholds, manufacturer date/chemistry, impedance
CPU/GPU temps, throttle flags (thermal/power/current), clocks, PL1/PL2, fan RPM, VRM temps
ECC error counts (if present), MemTest results, channel mode (dual/single)
Wi‑Fi RSSI/SNR, channel width (20/40/80/160), GI, MCS index, retry %, roam reason codes
IP/DHCP lease time, DNS latency, packet loss, jitter, MTU
BT: connection interval, retransmits, codec in use
WHEA events, TDRs, corrected hardware errors
Boot/resume times, unexpected shutdown counts
